name: Chongqing Sanxia Paints Co., Ltd
summary: Chongqing Sanxia Paints Co., Ltd manufactures and sells paints and coatings primarily in China. The company offers anti-corrosion, industrial, automotive, architectural, furniture, silicone, fluorocarbon, and other paints. The company's products are used in the aerospace, aviation, military, petroleum, petrochemical, wind power, nuclear power, and other projects, as well as in bridges. It primarily operates under the Sanxia brand name. Chongqing Sanxia Paints Co., Ltd. was formerly known as Chongqing Paint Factory. The company was founded in 1931 and is headquartered in Chongqing, China.
